description_long: This hotel is a single-story, modern structure with a rectangular footprint and a central open courtyard filled with greenery and seating. The building features multiple guest rooms arranged around the courtyard, with large windows and sliding glass doors providing access and natural light. The exterior walls are predominantly white with black accents, and the roofline is flat, giving the building a contemporary appearance. The front of the hotel includes a gated entrance, a driveway, and a landscaped area with palm trees. At the rear, there is a swimming pool and additional outdoor seating, enhancing the leisure amenities. The layout is open and inviting, with clear pathways and communal spaces designed for guest comfort.
description: A modern, single-story hotel with a central courtyard, flat roof, and a mix of white and black exterior walls, featuring a gated entrance, palm trees, and a rear swimming pool.
description_view_0: Front view showing the gated entrance, driveway, palm trees, and the main access to the central courtyard.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the elongated structure, multiple guest rooms, and the swimming pool at the far end.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the open courtyard, pool area, and extensive outdoor seating with visible landscaping.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the length of the building, guest room windows, and the pool area with adjacent greenery.
